creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to marco from comment #2)
> the whole go ecosystem is very biased towards static linking.
Oh, I see and understand the pain.  Yeah, their whole ecosystem is moronic on so many levels that makes it too hard (and thankless) to fight.

Not sure why did you close the PR, I thought we're still in the middle of discussion.  The original patch is ugly, but flavor would be much less so, let me sleep a couple nights over it.
